item-02.message: Link text "see more" is generic and gives no idea of the destination out of context.
item-02.justification: Anchor's accessible name is the generic phrase 'see more', a present-but-uninformative link name.

item-03.message: Link text "learn more" is generic and conveys no destination.
item-03.justification: Anchor name is the generic phrase 'learn more'.

item-06.message: Link text is a raw file path rather than a human-readable name.
item-06.justification: Anchor's visible/accessible name is the path '/files/q3-report.pdf', a noisy machine name.

item-07.message: Link text is a raw URL rather than descriptive text.
item-07.justification: Link name is the literal URL, a noisy name read out character-by-domain by screen readers.

item-08.message: Link text is a raw URL with query string instead of a readable name.
item-08.justification: Anchor name is a full URL including query parameters, a noisy machine name.

item-09.message: Link text is a raw path with query/token instead of descriptive text.
item-09.justification: Link name is a path plus query string, a noisy machine name.

item-10.message: Link text "click here" is generic and conveys no destination.

item-14.message: Link text "here" is generic and gives no destination context.

item-15.justification: Generic 'view more' link phrase, no destination conveyed.

item-16.message: Link text "click" is generic and conveys nothing about the destination.

item-22.message: Link text is a raw filename rather than a readable name.
item-22.justification: Link name is the filename 'report_final_v2.pdf', a noisy machine name.

item-23.message: Link text is a raw filename rather than a readable name.
item-23.justification: Link name is a versioned filename, a noisy machine name.

item-25.message: Link text is a raw path with query string instead of a readable name.
item-25.justification: Link name is a path plus query parameters, a noisy machine name.

item-28.message: Link text is a raw URL rather than descriptive text.
item-28.justification: Link name is a literal URL, a noisy machine name.

item-29.message: Link text is a raw URL with query string instead of a readable name.
item-29.justification: Link name is a full URL with query parameters, a noisy machine name.

item-30.message: Link text "this link" is generic and conveys no destination.
item-30.justification: Canonical generic link phrase 'this link', no destination information.

item-31.message: Link text is a raw path rather than a readable name.
item-31.justification: Link name is a bare URL path, a noisy machine name.

item-32.message: Link text is a raw SKU code rather than a product name.
item-32.justification: Link name is a SKU identifier, a noisy machine name.

item-41.message: Link text "find out more" is generic.
item-41.justification: Generic 'find out more' link phrase, no destination conveyed.

item-43.justification: Generic 'details' link word, explicitly a non-descriptive name.

item-46.message: Alt text "Slider Image 4" is a generic placeholder, not the image's content.
item-46.justification: Alt is a generic slider placeholder ('Slider Image 4'), conveys no meaning.

item-47.message: Alt text "pim_bu_100093" is a technical id, not a description.
item-47.justification: Alt is an auto-generated product id, meaningless to screen-reader users.

item-49.message: Alt text "DSC_0042" is a camera auto-id, not a description.
item-49.justification: Alt is a camera-generated filename/id, conveys no image content.

item-50.message: Alt text "image123.png" is a filename, not a description.
item-50.justification: Alt is a filename placeholder, meaningless to screen-reader users.

item-51.message: Alt text "IMG_4821.jpg" is a camera filename, not a description.
item-51.justification: Alt is a camera-generated filename, conveys no image content.
